productDisplayName: Numero Uno Women Dna Red Shoe
description: These super canvas ballerinas are designed to Fit your soft feet very gently. The dainty look combined with the sturdy but flexible outsole makes it an excellent footwear for daily use, with western attire.Upper Canvas upper for durability and comfort Toe cap attached to the side panels with stretchable elastic bands for easy movement of the forefoot Lightly padded collar to avoid shoe bites Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight feel and comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for excellent grip and traction Shoe careRub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
